name: nginx-multisite
description: Configures Nginx as a multi-vhost web server with SSL-enabled virtual hosts (test.cluster.local, ci.cluster.local, status.cluster.local), self-signed TLS certificate generation, HTTP→HTTPS redirects, and a comprehensive security hardening layer including UFW firewall, Fail2Ban, SSH hardening, and kernel sysctl tuning.

name: cache
description: Installs and configures both Memcached and Redis as caching services, with Redis running on port 6379 with password authentication and a post-processing Ruby block that strips deprecated replica configuration directives from the generated Redis config file.

name: fastapi-tutorial
description: Deploys a Python FastAPI application cloned from a public GitHub repository into a Python virtual environment, backed by a locally provisioned PostgreSQL database, and managed as a systemd service running uvicorn on port 8000.
